mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals impending recession risk, compressing equity risk premiums and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous quarterly GDP growth above trend and monthly CPI disinflation confirms a soft landing environment, extending equity valuations and generating positive returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns drop below the historical median when both GDP growth and CPI disinflation occur simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding 102 indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC becomes negative when INDPRO consistently exceeds the 102 threshold over a 12-month period.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts collapsing below 1300 thousand units precedes broader demand contraction, triggering negative equity returns over the following week as consumer spending weakens.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive when HOUST drops below the 1300 threshold in more than half of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with stable federal funds rates indicate resilient growth without inflationary pressure, supporting equity valuations and positive returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: SPX underperforms the baseline return when both PAYEMS and FEDFUNDS move in the specified configuration over a rolling 6-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail and food services revenue reflects expanding consumer spending, directly supporting corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical difference from zero.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI exceeds 280, persistent inflation forces prolonged high interest rates, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are not significantly negative when CPI crosses 280, or positive returns occur in more than 55 percent of triggered periods.
